Our commitment Expert coaching, equipment you can trust, and a space built for real progress—not trends. Your transformation is the measure of our work: clearer energy, stronger habits, and confidence that carries outside these walls.

Membership

Choose how you pay: monthly, quarterly, or yearly. All options include full gym access during posted hours. Prices in Indian Rupees (₹).

Monthly

₹1,500/mo

Billed monthly · cancel anytime

  • Full gym floor access
  • Locker room & showers
  • Group classes (per schedule)
  • Member app & class schedule
Choose monthly

Quarterly

₹4,199/quarter

Billed every 3 months · save vs monthly

  • Full gym floor access
  • Locker room & showers
  • Group classes (per schedule)
  • Member app & class schedule
Choose quarterly

Yearly

₹14,999/year

Billed once per year · best long-term value

  • Full gym floor access
  • Locker room & showers
  • Group classes (per schedule)
  • Member app & class schedule
Choose yearly

₹5,000/mo
